CRO.name: Crawley
CRO.note: Costs copied from POR — verify actual CRO figures

notes: DC cost overheads from CPQ finance spreadsheet. support_ops amounts derived from 6-month Jira worklog analysis (Nov 2025–May 2026): clean rate (P90 outliers removed) × 2.16× overhead multiplier × $80/hr. hrs_per_month and source fields added per service type for auditability. network_ops and compute_ops reserved at $0 pending specialist labour-rate data — firewall/switch/connectivity/loadbalancer should carry network_ops; Virtual/IaaS/clustering/backup should carry compute_ops. power_per_kw=0 for virtual/cloud/software services (power is in host server cost). Fusion sb_datacenter IDs included for pricebook joins.
